ddls:
CREATE TABLE "concrete_mixtures" (
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concrete mixture */,
  "cement" REAL /* Amount of cement (component 1) in kg per m^3 mixture */,
  "blast_furnace_slag" REAL /* Amount of blast furnace slag (component 2) in kg per m^3 mixture */,
  "fly_ash" REAL /* Amount of fly ash (component 3) in kg per m^3 mixture */,
  "coarse_aggregate" REAL /* Amount of coarse aggregate (component 6) in kg per m^3 mixture */,
  "fine_aggregate" REAL /* Amount of fine aggregate (component 7) in kg per m^3 mixture */,
  "age_days" INTEGER /* Age of the mixture in days */,
  "compressive_strength" REAL /* Compressive strength of the mixture in MPa (megapascals) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the mixture is associated with */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the mixture was tested */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch identifier of the mixture */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_performed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the test */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the test */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concrete_mixtures_test_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("test_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concrete_mixtures_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concrete_mixtures_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Contract value of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "site_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "test_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "test_method_description" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mixture_test_methods" (
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concrete mixture */,
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method used for the mixture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mixture_id", "test_method_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each concrete mixture
Amount of cement (component 1) in kg per m^3 mixture
Amount of blast furnace slag (component 2) in kg per m^3 mixture
Amount of fly ash (component 3) in kg per m^3 mixture
Amount of coarse aggregate (component 6) in kg per m^3 mixture
Amount of fine aggregate (component 7) in kg per m^3 mixture
Age of the mixture in days
Compressive strength of the mixture in MPa (megapascals)
Reference to the project the mixture is associated with
Reference to the site where the mixture was tested
ID of the user who performed the test
Contact email for inquiries about the site
Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin)
ID of the role associated with the user
Unique identifier for each test method
ID of the test method used for the mixture
